name: work-state
description: The work-state marketplace — local-first work-intelligence skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: work-state
plugins.description: Personal work intelligence facility. Harvests evidence of your work across GitHub, Gmail, Slack, Google Docs, scsiwyg, and Claude Code sessions into a local-first, schema-governed event store, then derives daily digests, weekly reports, and longitudinal intelligence. 9 skills + a local Next.js kanban/dashboard at port 3333.
